name: emw-warp-estimate_weights
help:
Warp wrapper to run EstimateWeights. Estimates per-item or per-frame weights for the population. Typically used in refinement workflows: first --resolve_items (per-particle weights), then --resolve_frames (per-frame weights).

*REFERENCES*:
[[https://warpem.github.io/reference/mtools/api/mtools/?h=mtools][MTools API]]

params.name: estimate_weights.population
params.label: Population file:
params.help: Required. Path to the .population file. May be set by the wrapper from input context.

params.name: estimate_weights.source
params.label: Source name (optional):
params.help: Name of the data source to estimate weights for (--source). Leave empty to use the first source in the population.

params.name: estimate_weights.resolve_items
params.label: Resolve per-item weights
params.help: Resolve per-particle weights (--resolve_items). Use first in refinement (e.g. Iter 5).

params.name: estimate_weights.resolve_frames
params.label: Resolve per-frame weights
params.help: Resolve per-frame weights (--resolve_frames). Use after resolve_items (e.g. Iter 6).

params.name: extra_estimate_weights
params.label: Extra arguments
params.help: Extra arguments to pass to EstimateWeights.

params.name: gpus
params.label: Fixed one GPU
params.help: Hidden parameter to force the use of a single GPU.
